item.title: Why Clarity Might Be the Most Underrated Leadership Advantage
item.description: Clarity isn’t just a communication skill. It’s a competitive edge in leadership.

item.title: 3 Tips for Customer Service Recovery
item.description: Your worst moments will become your greatest opportunities for building true customer loyalty.

item.title: Employees Are Walking Away From Higher Pay. Here’s Why HR Didn’t See it Coming
item.description: Compensation still matters, but for many employees, benefits are doing the real work of retention.

item.title: These Are the 7 Highest Paying Side Hustles for 2026, According to a New Report
item.description: A new report ranked side hustles by potential income. Here are the ones that topped the list for 2026.

item.title: Bad Bunny Highlighted Puerto Rico’s Energy Crisis. This Stanford Duo is Doing Something About it
item.description: Raya Power co-founders Meghan Wood and Nicole Gonzalez want to make solar power as accessible as buying and installing a fridge.
